---
title: "NDB"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)
```



```{r}
list.files("../xlsx/test/sec")
```

```{r}
dir.create("../df", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../df/dem", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../df/prf", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../df/mon", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../df/sec", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

```

```{r}
df_inj_dem_reg <- readRDS("../rds/inj/dem/df_inj_dem_reg")

df_test_dem_reg <- readRDS("../rds/test/dem/df_test_dem_reg")

df_surg_dem_reg <- readRDS("../rds/surg/dem/df_surg_dem_reg")

```

```{r}
df_mat_dem_reg <- readRDS("../rds/mat/dem/df_mat_dem_reg")
```



```{r}
#regular long

df_inj_dem_rl <- df_inj_dem_reg %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(starts_with("M_"), starts_with("F_")),
               names_to = "SEX_AGE",
               values_to = "VALUE") %>%
  mutate(SEX = str_extract(SEX_AGE, "^[:alpha:]")) %>%
  mutate(AGE = str_remove(SEX_AGE, "^[:alpha:]\\_")) %>%
  mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE), ~ na_if(.x, "-"))) %>%
  mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE), ~ as.numeric(.x)))
```

```{r}
save_dem_long <- function(x){
  x %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(starts_with("M_"), starts_with("F_")),
               names_to = "SEX_AGE",
               values_to = "VALUE") %>%
  mutate(SEX = str_extract(SEX_AGE, "^[:alpha:]")) %>%
  mutate(AGE = str_remove(SEX_AGE, "^[:alpha:]\\_")) %>%
  mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE, POINT), ~ na_if(.x, "-"))) %>%
  mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE, POINT), ~ replace_na(.x, "0"))) %>%
  mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE, POINT), ~ as.numeric(.x))) 
}
```

```{r}
df_surg_dem_reg %>% save_dem_long()
```


```{r}
type <- c("inj", "test", "surg")

#path <- paste0("../rds/", type, "/dem/df_", type,  "_dem_reg")
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:length(type)){
  from <- paste0("../rds/", type[i], "/dem/df_", type[i],  "_dem_reg")
  
  to <- paste0("../df/dem/df_", type[i], "_dem_reg")
  
  readRDS(from) %>% save_dem_long() %>% saveRDS(to)
}
```
